title: Crispy Moroccan Harira Cakes
description: A twist on traditional Moroccan harira soup, these crispy cakes are perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, crushed crispy flatbread, harira, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small cakes.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the cakes and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the cakes to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, until crispy and cooked through.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
